title: Account Contextual Display Verification
description: Verify that account names are displayed with the correct components based on the screen context.

steps.expected_result: Each account displays its name, currency, and owner clearly.

steps.action: Navigate to 'New transaction' (e.g., Add Expense) and open the Account selector dropdown.
steps.expected_result: The dropdown items show the full identity of the account, including name, currency, and owner.

steps.action: Select an account and view the transaction on the Timeline or Dashboard.
steps.expected_result: The account is listed as '{name} ({owner})' (or similar format) without the currency, since the transaction amount already shows the currency.
